title: ramosy's Drivable Chicken
description: This mod allows players to tame and ride chickens, adding a fun twist to the game.
body:
This mod introduces a unique feature: taming and riding chickens. A special menu, accessible by pressing F8, allows players to summon their feathered companions. Simply open the menu, press the button, and your loyal chicken will appear, ready to ride. This mod adds a fun twist to the game, enhancing the Minecraft experience.

Author's Youtube Channel : https://www.youtube.com/@ramosyyy
